things.name: Fiji Museum
things.description: South Pacific's finest museum with the cannibal fork of Reverend Baker and traditional artifacts

things.name: Suva Municipal Market
things.description: Bustling market with tropical produce, kava, spices and Fijian handicrafts

things.name: Thurston Gardens
things.description: Botanical gardens in the centre of Suva established in the 1880s with tropical plants

things.name: Suva Harbour & Foreshore
things.description: Waterfront promenade with views of the harbour and the cruise ship terminal

things.name: Colo-i-Suva Forest Park
things.description: Tropical rainforest reserve with waterfalls and swimming holes just 11km from Suva

things.name: Government Buildings
things.description: Grand colonial parliament complex built in 1939 in neoclassical style

things.name: Holy Trinity Cathedral
things.description: Anglican cathedral with a mosaic Christ window and a traditional Fijian feel

things.name: Levuka Historic Town
things.description: Fiji's original capital and the South Pacific's first colonial town, a UNESCO Heritage Site

things.name: Pacific Harbour Arts Village
things.description: World-class shark dive and traditional Fijian cultural village west of Suva

things.name: Natadola Beach
things.description: Fiji's finest white-sand beach on the Coral Coast, 60km from Suva
